market_sentiment.label: 中性
market_sentiment.summary: 資料更新中，請稍後再試

articles.title: Securitize CEO says tokenized stocks could unlock a $5 trillion crypto market
articles.description: At a panel at ETHConf, Carlos Domingo argued that bringing stocks and exchange-traded funds onchain could unlock a market far larger than today's roughly $30 billion tokenized asset sector.

articles.title: Can tech companies learn to love cheaper AI models?
articles.description: If those same AI workloads can be handled by cheaper models without affecting quality, it would mean a massive shift in the economics of AI.

articles.title: WWDC 2026: Everything announced on Siri AI, iOS 27, Apple Intelligence, and more
articles.description: Apple primarily made the case for an improved experience with its long-standing Siri assistant, which like most other announcements had a hefty helping of AI.

articles.title: Bitcoin may act as a ‘canary in the coal mine’ as risk-off pressure spreads: Bitwise
articles.description: Bitwise research suggests that Bitcoin is leading a broader risk-off move across markets as global liquidity and stablecoin reserves remain elevated.

articles.title: CISA gives US federal agencies three days to fix a VPN bug under attack by a ransomware gang
articles.description: Check Point said hackers broke into dozens of organizations by exploiting a VPN bug in several of its products used across the government.

articles.title: BBB refers prediction market Kalshi to state regulators over ad inquiry
articles.description: A BBB advertising watchdog escalated its review of Kalshi after the prediction market platform declined to participate in an inquiry into influencer disclosure practices.

articles.title: Anthropic’s Claude Fable 5 is a version of Mythos the public can access today
articles.description: Anthropic is releasing Claude Fable 5, its first Mythos-class model available to the public. The model comes with guardrails that block responses in high-risk areas like cybersecurity and biology.

articles.title: Apple’s foldable iPhone could be just around the corner
articles.description: The iOS 27 developer beta includes code that references the fold state and screen angle of a device.

articles.title: It’s not FAANG anymore. It’s MANGOS.
articles.description: With SpaceX, Anthropic, and OpenAI all eyeing massive public debuts, the tech industry may soon have a new class of corporate overlords — and a new acronym to match. Say goodbye to FAANG and hello to MANGOS.

articles.title: UK financial regulator moves to allow mutual funds 10% exposure to crypto ETNs
articles.description: The Financial Conduct Authority proposed allowing some investment schemes to add exposure to crypto exchange-traded notes.

articles.title: 5 corruption gaps Congress must close in the Clarity Act
articles.description: The most consequential crypto legislation in the world is moving forward in the U.S. Senate. As written, it leaves the United States exposed to money laundering, sanctions evasion, and conflicts of interest at the highest levels of government, argues Greytak.

articles.title: Apple says it may remove some apps from the App Store if they don’t attract users
articles.description: Apple may begin removing existing apps that it considers stale, low-value, or unable to attract users.

articles.title: Bitcoin price slips toward $62K local lows as bear-market history keeps repeating
articles.description: Bitcoin bear market analysis showed copycat BTC price moves ongoing despite new hopes of a US-Iran peace deal.

articles.title: Trad.Fi, W3 target $650 million in onchain private credit using AI evaluation
articles.description: Equipment-financing lender Trad.Fi is working with W3 to automate capital workflows and bring real-economy business lending onto public blockchain rails.

articles.title: Apple brings streaming-style subscription bundles to the App Store
articles.description: Apple is expanding its App Bundles feature to allow developers to partner with one another on discounted subscription packages.

articles.title: Ethena lands Janus Henderson backing as asset manager invests in ENA, eyes USDe distribution
articles.description: The deal underscores the trend of traditional asset managers backing DeFi infrastructure, following BlackRock's Uniswap and Apollo's Morpho investments.

articles.title: Come back after the summer, says one analyst on crypto markets
articles.description: Bitcoin's growing divergence from tech stocks raises concerns as AI spending surges, says Quinn Thompson.

articles.title: Bitcoin bottom? These four charts hint at BTC price dropping to $50K
articles.description: A $50,000 Bitcoin price target remains in play despite BTC maintaining above $60,000 support for now, as multiple indicators warn the bottom may not be in.

articles.title: Apple’s App Store rolls out personalized recommendations
articles.description: Apple will now recommend apps based on your downloads and behavior.

articles.title: 銀河系黑洞持續兩萬年的「呼吸」，科學家首度直擊人馬座 A* 向外吹出高溫氣流
articles.description: 銀河系中心的超大質量黑洞人馬座 A*（Sgr A*）終於被發現正在向外「呼吸」。天文學家利用阿塔卡瑪大型毫米及 […]
